mapper.select: SELECT /* /mypage/mspAddInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectMspAddInfo : 할부원금 조회 */ CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE RNUM = 1
SELECT /* /mypage/getOrgScanId : McpMypageMapper.selectOrgScanId MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO에서 orgSacnId 조회 */ SCAN_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /* /mypage/juoSubInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectJuoSubInfo : 회원가입시 회선 정보 조회 */ T2.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO , T2.USER_SSN AS CUSTOMER_SSN , T2.GENDER , T2.CONTRACT_NUM , T2.CUSTOMER_ID , T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE , T1.LEGAL_CI FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(T2.SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))

SELECT /* /mypage/channelInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectChannelInfo 개통 채널정보 */ SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS AGENT_CD , CMN.CD_DSC AS AGENT_NM , CMN.ETC1 AS CHANNEL_CD , CMN.ETC2 AS CHANNEL_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CMN WHERE SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'RCP9031' AND CMN.USG_YN = 'Y' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /* /mypage/cntrListNoLogin : McpMypageMapper.selectCntrListNoLogin 계약 현행화 정보 */ A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.MODEL_NAME , A.MODEL_ID , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CNTR_MOBILE_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.DOBYYYYMMDD , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS USER_NAME , A.USER_SSN AS unUserSSn , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , B.CUSTOMER_ID , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , A.PPPO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID
AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{cntrMobileNo})
AND UPPER(REPLACE(A.SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{subLinkName},' ',''))
AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'

SELECT /* /mypage/socDesc : McpMypageMapper.selectSocDesc */ AA.USERID , AA.CNTR_MOBILE_NO , AA.SVC_CNTR_NO , AA.SOC , AA.ENGG_MNTH_CNT , AA.RATE_NM , AA.BASE_AMT , AA.RMK , AA.MODEL_NAME , AA.DOBYYYYMMDD
, AA.INTM_SRL_NO , AA.INTM_SRL_NO AS UN_INTM_SRL_NO , AA.MODEL_ID , NVL(AA.DC_AMT, 0) DC_AMT, POINT_ID , AA.SUB_LINK_NAME , AA.USER_SSN AS unUserSSn , AA.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , AA.REMIND_YN , AA.REMIND_PROD_TYPE FROM ( SELECT A.USERID, A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO, D.SVC_CNTR_NO, D.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SOC , NVL((SELECT ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM (SELECT ENGG_MNTH_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )WHERE RNUM = 1 ), 0) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , C.RATE_NM, C.BASE_AMT, C.RMK, C.REMIND_YN, C.REMIND_PROD_TYPE , D.MODEL_NAME , D.DOBYYYYMMDD
, D.INTM_SRL_NO , D.MODEL_ID , '' AS POINT_ID , 0 AS DC_AMT , D.SUB_LINK_NAME , D.USER_SSN , D.CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_RATE_MST C , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D WHERE 1=1 AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = A.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND D.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM ) AA
SELECT /* /mypage/customerType : McpMypageMapper.selectCustomerType */ CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{custId}

SELECT /* /mypage/selectConSsnObj : McpMypageMapper.selectConSsnObj : 주민번호,이름,연락처로 계약번호 조회 */ CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , T1.SUBSCRIBER_NO , T1.USER_SSN , T1.SUB_LINK_NAME , T2.BL_BILLING_METHOD , T2.BAN , T1.CUSTOMER_ID , T1.SUB_STATUS , T3.CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO T1 , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO T2 , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO T3 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.BAN = T2.BAN AND T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T3.CUSTOMER_ID AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
AND SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo})
AND UPPER(REPLACE(SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))
AND USER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(#{userSsn})

SELECT /* /mypage/prePayment : McpMypageMapper.selectPrePayment : 선불 요금제 사용 여부 조회 */ COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A, MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND B.PAY_CL_CD = 'PP'

SELECT /* /mypage/getInsrInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectInsrInfo 안심보험가입여부조회 */ A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, B.INSR_STAT_CD, C.INSR_PROD_CD AS ORDER_EXIST, D.CONTRACT_NUM AS REQUEST_EXIST FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A, MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER B, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER WHERE 1 = 1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND IF_TRGT_CD NOT IN ('C', 'F') AND TO_DATE(STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ROWNUM = 1) C, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQ_TYPE = 'IS' AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ROWNUM = 1) D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND (B.INSR_STAT_CD <> 2 OR B.INSR_STAT_CD IS NULL)

SELECT /* /mypage/getInsrInfoByCd : McpMypageMapper.selectInsrInfoByCd 안심보험정보조회(by insrCd) */ RATE_CD INSR_CD, RATE_NM INSR_NAME, TO_CHAR(BASE_AMT, 'FM999,999,999') AS INSR_PRICE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE 1 = 1 AND RATE_CD = #{insrCd}

SELECT /* /mypage/farPricePlan : McpMypageMapper.selectFarPricePlan */ A.RATE_CD AS PRV_RATE_CD --요금제코드 , A.RATE_NM AS PRV_RATE_GRP_NM--요금제명 , A.BASE_AMT AS PRV_BASE_AMT--기본료 , A.RMK AS PRV_RMK--비고 , B.APP_START_DD --적용일시 , NVL(A.BASE_AMT,0)+(NVL(A.BASE_AMT,0)*0.1) AS BASE_VAT_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , (SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.SOC AND a.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT /* /mypage/countFarPricePlanList : McpMypageMapper.selectFarPricePlanListCount */ COUNT(*) FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231'

SELECT /* /mypage/farPricePlanList : McpMypageMapper.selectFarPricePlanList */ PRV_RATE_GRP_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_NM , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , PRV_RATE_CD , PRV_RATE_NM , PRV_PTRN_RATE_YN , PRV_PAY_CL_CD , PRV_DATA_TYPE , PRV_RATE_TYPE , PRV_RMK , PRV_BASE_AMT , PRV_APPL_STRT_DT , PRV_APPL_END_DT , NXT_RATE_GRP_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_NM , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , NXT_RATE_CD , NXT_RATE_NM , NXT_PTRN_RATE_YN , NXT_PAY_CL_CD , NXT_DATA_TYPE , NXT_RATE_TYPE , NXT_RMK , NXT_BASE_AMT , NXT_APPL_STRT_DT , NXT_APPL_END_DT , NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT,0)+(NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT,0)*0.1) AS BASE_VAT_AMT FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231' ORDER BY NXT_BASE_AMT DESC

SELECT /* /mypage/enggInfo1 : McpMypageMapper.selectEnggInfo 약정정보 */
CONTRACT_NUM -- 계약번호 , SUBSCRIBER_NO -- 전화번호 , APP_END_DATE -- 약정종료일자 appEndDate , CASE WHEN APP_END_DATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'N' WHEN APP_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' WHEN APP_END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' END AS ENGG_YN -- 약정여부
FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , ENGG_END_DT AS APP_END_DATE FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_SELF WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )

SELECT /* /mypage/farPriceAddInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectFarPriceAddInfo */ APP_START_DD FROM( SELECT SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6) AS APP_START_DD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DECODE(SOC,#{soc},SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6)+1,SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6)) DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE SERVICE_TYPE='P' AND CONTRACT_NUM= #{cntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' )WHERE RNUM=1

SELECT /* /mypage/closeSubList : McpMypageMapper.selectCloseSubList 해지 해야할 부가 서비스 리스트 */ CMN.CD_DSC AS SOC_NM , FEA.SOC AS SOC_CODE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO FEA , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CMN , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE 1=1 AND FEA.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND FEA.SOC = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'RCP9030' AND CMN.USG_YN = 'Y' AND EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM= #{contractNum} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY SOC

SELECT /* /mypage/getChrgPrmtIdSocChg : McpMypageMapper.selectChrgPrmtIdSocChg 요금제 변경 온라인 프로모션ID 조회 */ DISTINCT(PRMT_ID) FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN STRT_DT AND END_DT AND ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 AND REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND MNP_YN = 'Y' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'AD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_AD.NEXTVAL, '000000')) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO /* /mypage/insertDisApd : McpMypageMapper.insertDisApd */ MSP_DIS_APD ( APD_SEQ, REGST_DT, PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM,
PRMT_ID,
CHNL_CD, EVNT_CD, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, PRMT_AGNT_CD, RATE_CD, ON_OFF_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT #{apdSeq}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DT, 'N' AS PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM,
#{prmtId} AS PRMT_ID,
'01' AS CHNL_CD, 'SCH' AS EVNT_CD, '00' AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, '1100011741' AS PRMT_AGNT_CD, #{socCode} AS RATE_CD, '0' AS ON_OFF_TYPE, 'MNP3' AS OPER_TYPE, 'UU' AS REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MCP' AS REGST_ID, SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: SELECT /* /mypage/romotionDcList : McpMypageMapper.selectPromotionDcList 가입 해야할 부가 서비스 리스트 */ DISTINCT B.SOC AS SOC_CODE , ADDITION_NAME AS SOC_NM , RANTAL AS SOC_PRICE , A.PRMT_ID FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL A , MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /* /mypage/getRateInfo : McpMypageMapper.selectRateInfo 월납부 통신요금 = 기본요금 - 할인요금 */ BASE_AMT , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(CEIL(-RANTAL * 1.1)),0) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL T1 , MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.ADDITION_KEY = T2.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN T1.STRT_DT AND T1.END_DT AND T1.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 수정12323 AND T1.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND T1.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND T1.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND T1.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND T1.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND T1.USG_YN = 'Y' ) AS PROMOTION_DC_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND a.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /* /mypage/regService : McpMypageMapper.selectRegService */ A.SERVICE_TYPE --서비스유형 , A.RATE_CD --요금제코드 , A.APPL_END_DT --적용종료일자 , A.APPL_STRT_DT --적용시작일자 , A.RATE_NM --요금제명 , A.RATE_GRP_CD --요금제그룹코드 , A.PAY_CL_CD --선후불구분 , A.RATE_TYPE --요금제유형( ORG0008 ) , A.DATA_TYPE --데이터유형( ORG0018 ) , A.BASE_AMT --기본료 , A.FREE_CALL_CL_CD --망내외무료통화구분 , A.FREE_CALL_CNT --무료통화건수 , A.NW_IN_CALL_CNT --망내무료통화건수 , A.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT --망외무료통화건수 , A.FREE_SMS_CNT --무료문자건수 , A.FREE_DATA_CNT --무료데이터건수 , A.RMK --비고 , A.REGST_ID --등록자ID , A.REGST_DTTM --등록일시 , A.RVISN_ID --수정자ID , A.RVISN_DTTM --수정일시 , A.ONLINE_TYPE_CD --온라인유형코드 , A.AL_FLAG --알요금제 구분자 , B.SVC_REL_TP --가입유형 :c 가능: b 필수 (자동가입): d 가입불가 FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , (SELECT RATE_CD,ADD_SVC_CD,SERVICE_TYPE, SVC_REL_TP FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST WHERE RATE_CD = (SELECT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SVC_REL_TP <> 'D' ) B WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE= 'R' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_CD = B.ADD_SVC_CD AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT RATE_CD FROM(SELECT DISTINCT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST WHERE RATE_CD IN (SELECT DISTINCT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) BB WHERE A.RATE_CD = BB.RATE_CD ) ORDER BY A.BASE_AMT DESC, A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC
